title: Delete workspaces from previous members
excerpt: I am trying to clean up our account and there are several private workspaces from previous team members. Since they are private and I was not the creator I am unable to delete them from our account. It’s not impacting my…

posts.author: SMCarter (Sarah Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to clean up our account and there are several private workspaces from previous team members. Since they are private and I was not the creator I am unable to delete them from our account. It’s not impacting my current team members as they can’t see them in their “recent” lists, but it’s frustrating that I can’t remove them as the account administrator.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

Since you are seeing these workspaces I’m assuming you are an admin in the account. By opening these workspaces you can grant yourself access and make you owner of the workspace which would allow you to cleanup/delete the workspace itself:

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: SMCarter (Sarah Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Maarten, great suggestion, I forgot about that option!
